## Additional Database Columns Not in Category Structure
- Some table headers don't have direct database column matches (marked as "*not mapped*")
- Unit fields are often combined with their measurement fields in the database
- The database contains some additional fields not present in the category structure
- Some fields may store combined information (e.g., duration might include unit information)
